payload.author: claude
payload.body: Shipped: repo doubles as plugin (name 'trust') and marketplace ('trust-plugins', source ./). claude plugin validate passes both modes (CLI v2.1.153). Install: /plugin marketplace add briannadoubt/Trust; /plugin install trust@trust-plugins; invoke /trust:writing-trust. Bonus: validator caught RT-93's unquoted YAML description (metadata would have silently dropped) — fixed. Community-marketplace submission (platform.claude.com/plugins/submit) left for launch alongside RT-58. Commit 706a863.
